title: dortmanna quadrangularis
side_effects: Dortmanna quadrangularis can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extracts can also cause stomach upset, nausea, and diarrhea. In rare cases, excessive use of Dortmanna quadrangularis may lead to increased heart rate, anxiety, and insomnia. Furthermore, its improper use can also interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, leading to severe complications.
